M8/#624, COMM. SUE KAPLAN, CSR R BARULICH, CLK H HAMILTON 1400: CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF, JOHN WEINSTEIN FOR DEFENDANT, WHO IS PRESENT. SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE ON OR BEFORE 12-15-98. DEFENDANT TO PAY $200. BY 5-27-98, THEN $164. + $300. ATTORNEY FEES AT $75. PER MONTH BEGINNING 7-15-98, CONCLUDING 12-15-98, FINAL INSTALLMENT OF $89. RENT OF $185 TO BE PAID ON TIME DURING THIS PERIOD. FAILURE TO PAY WILL RESULT IN APPLICATION TO LAW & MOTION FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND ATTORNEY FEES DUE AS A RESULT OF BREACH OF STIPULATION. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY REMAINING IN THE EVENT OF SURRENDER OR EVICTION SHALL BECOME PROPERTY OF OWNER. JUDGMENT WOULD ISSUE UPON 24 HOURS TELEPHONIC NOTICE TO MR. WEINSTEIN. GENERAL RELEASE. NO FURTHER STAYS ON JUDGMENT SHOULD THERE BE A BREACH.
